channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: DonningTime
item.description: Adds a configurable delay to the donning of armor (and optionally clothes)

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Tree Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing larger variants of trees.

item.title: Rust Girls - Player Model
item.description: BE the waifu!

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Greatly increases the threat the elements pose, blizzards, hurricanes, monsoons. Get ready!

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Terrain Slabs
item.description: Don't jump. Just walk.

item.title: Ancestral Bliss Shaders
item.description: Shaders compatible with most GPUs

item.title: Place On Slabs
item.description: Lets you place some stuff on slabs

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul

item.title: Combat Overhaul Fork
item.description: 1.22 fork

item.title: JSCM Frozen Struggles
item.description: A new modpack for my girlfriend and I. Focused around a Sub-Artic playthrough

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Salty´s Immersive: Lanterns
item.description: Lanterns that flicker, react to movement and wind, swinging and make noise.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: Better Honey in Meals
item.description: Makes honey give the same amount of satiety in a meal as most fruits, but not as much as breadfruit.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: lhgui
item.description: GUI mod for lasthearth server

item.title: Builder's Inventory
item.description: A window with tabs that gives you access to chests you tag.

item.title: Charsel Item
item.description: Add item, that can't be crafted. Item allow player change class.

item.title: Human mod fork (For Lost land Server)
item.description: Hi! This is a modification to the humans mod by Maltiez, for the Lost - Lands server

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Vanilla Fantasy Overhaul - Lore Mobs
item.description: A remodling of the Lore Mobs to make them fantastical. Not Finished.

item.title: Currency Exchange
item.description: A light-weight currency exchange addon for the Coinage Mod

item.title: Underwater Horrors
item.description: Adds nightmare sea monsters to Vintage Story (Sea Serpents, Kraken)

item.title: Food Preferences
item.description: Adds a preference for foods that is personalized per world and per player

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all vanilla armor designs for each respective armor pieces.

item.title: Unique Weapons
item.description: Adds mostly Dark and Darker themed weapons to vintage story with custom models and textures

item.title: Tillerworks
item.description: Drivable tractors and towable farming trailers with installable engines, wheels, and homemade fuel.
